title.en: Somewhere in the deep sea of the Pole Road.

content.en:
After countless researches, coupled with his own comprehension of the Ice Extreme Dao and the Immortal Extreme Dao, Ye Tian was finally able to successfully rely on himself to repair the damaged Extreme Dao Origin.

Of course, Ye Tian had only researched his own Extreme Dao Origin at present, but the Ice Phoenix Lord's daughter couldn't repair the Extreme Dao Origin by herself, and he couldn't pass it on to the Ice Phoenix Lord's daughter.

Therefore, he had to find a way to create an Extreme Dao Secret Technique to guide the Extreme Dao Origin in the body of the Ice Phoenix Lord's daughter, and restore the Extreme Dao Origin little by little.

For Ye Tian, although this step is still difficult, it has a direction, and it is only a matter of time.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to research, failing again and again, but every time he failed, it was an experience, reducing a direction of failure.

Time is like a trace, and millions of eternal years have passed before you know it.

this day.

After countless researches, Ye Tian finally succeeded in creating an Extreme Path Secret Technique.

Somewhere in the deep sea of the Pole Road.

Ye Tian stood in front of the duplicate body of the Extreme Dao Ice Phoenix Egg, cast the Extreme Dao Secret Technique, pasted it on the Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg, and immediately began to repair the Extreme Dao Ice Phoenix Egg, which was seriously damaged.

As time passed, the origin of the Extreme Dao was restored to normal little by little.

Of course, this is not completely good, because the chaotic Extreme Dao rules in the body of the Extreme Dao Ice Phoenix Egg are also destroying the Extreme Dao Ice Phoenix Egg itself, although the Extreme Dao Origin is healed and the injury is alleviated, but it still has to guide the Extreme Dao Rules back to normal, otherwise it will still destroy the Extreme Dao Origin itself.

However, compared to repairing the origin of the Extreme Dao, it is much easier to guide the rules of the Extreme Path.

It only took hundreds of thousands of eternal years for Ye Tian to successfully guide the Extreme Dao rules back to normal.

At this point, this Extreme Phoenix Egg has completely recovered.

Ye Tian didn't go to Ice Phoenix Island just like that, but continued to study, he couldn't just succeed once to save the daughter of the Lord of Ice Phoenix, at least he had to succeed many times, and only after confirming that he was 100% successful would he go!

Thereupon.

Ye Tian continued to study the restoration, and succeeded again and again.

After a long time, Ye Tian confirmed that this Restoration Extreme Dao Origin Extreme Dao Secret Technique was feasible.

"This Extreme Path Secret Technique is called the Ice Phoenix Repair Technique, and the Secret Technique that guides the Extreme Dao rules is called the Ice Phoenix Guiding Technique. "

Ye Tian said.

Subsequently, he disintegrated his Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg Replica Body, recondensed the Void Stygian Replica Body, and then headed for Ice Phoenix Island.

......

Ice Phoenix Island.

Ye Tian came here again and asked to see the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

"Is that Void Sparrow really here?

But she didn't think that the other party could do it, and it was more likely to fool him, or treat him indiscriminately, and try her luck.

"If you can't save my daughter, then fall!"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix said secretly.

Subsequently, she asked people to bring Ye Tian over.

Soon, Ye Tian saw the Lord of the Ice Phoenix again.

"I've seen the Lord of the Ice Phoenix!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Little one, are you sure you have a way to cure my daughter, if you fool me, your fate will be miserable!" said the Lord of the Ice Phoenix coldly.

"I'm absolutely sure!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

"Hehe, those Extreme Creatures who came to treat my daughter were also 100% before, but they failed, and they made my daughter's situation worse, so they died!" said the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

"Lord of the Ice Phoenix, I can treat your daughter in front of you, if there is a little disadvantage or a little problem, you can kill me on the spot!" Ye Tian said.

Now it was the turn of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix to be shocked, what kind of confidence made Ye Tian have such confidence!

"Could it be that this little guy can really do it?"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix was curious.

He pondered for a moment before he said, "I can let you go for treatment, but first tell me what method you are going to use?"

"Extreme Secret Technique!"

Ye Tian said.

"Extreme Secret Technique?" the Lord of the Ice Phoenix was a little surprised.

Extreme Dao creatures are not good at creating Extreme Path Secret Techniques and Extreme Dao Control Techniques, and they can hardly compare with cultivators in this regard.

And the extreme secret technique that can cure her daughter, she has also heard of it, and she never dares to test it, because once it fails, it will be over!

She also thought that Ye Tian would take out some kind of rare Extreme Dao treasure that could save her daughter, but she didn't expect it to be an Extreme Dao Secret Technique.

"Teach me your Extreme Secret Technique, I need to deduce it. "

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian agreed.

The Ice Phoenix Repair Technique he created can be taught, so it is only effective for the Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg, and is useless for others, so it is not of high value.

Immediately, Ye Tian taught the Extreme Dao Repair Technique to the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

After the Lord of the Ice Phoenix obtains the Ice Phoenix Repair Technique, he immediately begins research.

At first, she thought that this secret technique was inconspicuous and nothing extraordinary, but after calculating it, she became dignified and expectant.

"This secret technique seems to be really effective!"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix said secretly.

But this secret technique was not created by her, and if she used this secret technique, the effect would definitely not be good.

Therefore, Ye Tian has to come.

"You can try, but if you fail and my daughter's situation becomes serious, I will still kill you!" the Lord of the Ice Phoenix threatened.

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix took her daughter out.

At this time, Ye Tian walked over and put his paws on the eggshell of the Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg.

And the Ice Phoenix Lord's extreme power covered the surrounding time and space, once Ye Tian failed, the other party was afraid that he would not hesitate to bombard him.

Ye Tian didn't care about this.

"Extreme Repair, Repair!"

The power of the Ice Extreme Dao and the power of the Immortal Extreme Dao circulated on Ye Tian's claws, entering the Extreme Dao Origin of the Extreme Dao Ice Phoenix Egg, and began to repair her Extreme Dao Origin.

In an instant, the extent of the Extreme Dao Origin's injuries was suppressed, and even without the power of the Ice Phoenix Lord, the situation would not deteriorate any longer.

"Hey, it's really effective!"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix was looking forward to it.

She didn't dare to disturb Ye Tian, and watched quietly.

Of course, this is just the beginning, and it is not clear whether it can be finally fixed.

Time passed slowly, and the Extreme Dao Origin of the Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg was repaired little by little, although the speed of repair was slow, but at least it was being repaired, and there was no tendency to deteriorate at all.

After a long time, the Extreme Dao Ice Phoenix Egg's Extreme Dao Origin was almost recovered.

Seeing this, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix breathed a sigh of relief.

At the very least, her daughter's life was saved, even if it was repaired here and no longer repaired, there would be no problem with the pregnancy, and there was no need to forcibly give birth, and the potential would not be reduced too much.

Of course, a perfect repair is naturally better.

Therefore, she continued to wait for Ye Tian to repair her daughter's Extreme Dao Origin.

After a long time, the Extreme Dao Origin of this Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg has completely recovered, and there is no sequelae.

Then, Ye Tian cast the Ice Phoenix Guiding Technique and began to guide the chaotic Extreme Dao Rules in her body, returning it to normal.
